user_goal: 实现 fixture/mock-first 的 Global ETF Momentum 回测 MVP，包含 Python package、CI、fixture 数据、策略信号、T+1 Open 月度回测、风险检查、JSON/Markdown 报告、Python workflow E2E 和 no-live/no-secret/no-network guard tests。
generator_handoff: Generator should implement B006 features sequentially, starting with F001. B006 must create Python CI and tests, not CD; must not introduce Vitest, Playwright, Cypress, browser E2E, frontend, broker, paper/live, external API hard dependency, database, deployment, tax optimization, or AI trading. Required path is fixture/mock-first with pytest/ruff/compileall/mypy or documented staged mypy, Python workflow E2E, no-live/no-secret/no-network guard tests, T Close signals, T+1 Open execution, JSON/Markdown reports, and Portfolio Manager-compatible outputs.

session_notes.planner: 2026-05-12: B006 planning opened after user agreed with CI/testing decision. B006 is implementation batch for Global ETF Backtest MVP. Decision: CI yes, CD no, Vitest no, browser E2E no, Python workflow E2E yes. Status moved to building for Generator F001.
